steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage introduces the Marsalis family as "the first family of jazz" and then explains what each member accomplished to earn that nickname. The question asks for the main purpose of the text.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — explain why a musical family earned a nickname: the text opens with the nickname and spends every remaining sentence justifying it with the family's achievements. ✓
  • Choice B — compare family members' styles: the passage lists their accomplishments but never contrasts one member's style against another's. ✗
  • Choice C — highlight Wynton's Grammy Award: Wynton's award is one supporting detail, not the central focus of the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — describe their collaborative projects: no collaboration between family members is mentioned. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
